name: InnoNav Core Ruleset
description: Core rules - easy to fix or with auto-fixes available. Includes Base ruleset.

rules.justification: Variable is unused.
Do not assign a text to a target with smaller size.
Single-field primary key requires NotBlank. [autofix] (migrated from LC0013)
Set NotBlank to false when No. Series TableRelation exists. [autofix] (migrated from LC0067)
Install/Upgrade codeunits should have Access=Internal. [autofix] (migrated from LC0030)
All objects should be covered by a permission set. (migrated from LC0015)
Empty captions should be locked. [autofix] (migrated from LC0041)
Labels suffixed with Tok must be locked. [autofix] (migrated from LC0046)
Procedure name must not contain whitespaces. Easy to fix.
IP address must not be present in source code. Security, easy to fix.
Local variable name must not contain whitespace or wildcard symbols.
Global variable name must not contain whitespace or wildcard symbols.
Parameter name must not contain whitespace or wildcard symbols.
Property already exists at object level with the same value. Easy to remove.
Redundant Editable property already set at object level. Easy to remove.
Wrong casing detected. [autofix] (migrated from LC0005)
Record variables must have SecurityFiltering attribute. [autofix] Security.
Always use BEGIN..END blocks. [autofix]
RecordRef variables must have SecurityFiltering attribute. [autofix] Security.
QFIX object has expired and must be removed. Critical.
QFIX object must have ObsoleteTag with expiration date (DD.MM.YYYY). [autofix] Critical.
Do not use Object IDs in declarations or function calls. [autofix] (includes old LC0012)
DataClassification redundancy. [autofix]
ApplicationArea redundancy. [autofix]
Use IsEmpty instead of Count for existence checks.
Use new Date/Time/DateTime methods. [autofix]
AllowInCustomizations redundancy. [autofix]
Use partial records on read operations. [autofix]
FlowFields should not be editable. [autofix] (migrated from LC0001)
Filter operators should not be used in SetRange. [autofix] (migrated from LC0008)
SetFilter with unsupported operator. [autofix] (migrated from LC0050)
JsonToken JPath should use double quotes. [autofix]
Use IsNullGuid() for empty GUID validation. [autofix]
Single quote escaping issue in filters. [autofix] (migrated from LC0059)
